flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Nevada State University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.4k → $21.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Nevada State University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.1k → $6.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Nevada State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Nevada State University rose 92% between 2021 and 2024 (8.7% → 16.7%).
